name: Louis Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise and chili sauce.
2. Stir in the fresh parsley, lemon juice, prepared horseradish, grated onion, salt, and pepper until well mixed.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. This dressing will yield approximately 1-1/2 cups and can be used as a salad dressing or dip. It pairs exceptionally well with boiled shrimp instead of ketchup-based dips and complements Onion Mums beautifully.
